task_completion.description: Read the orbital and physical parameters from the state file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the contents of `~/Desktop/magsat2_state.txt` opened in a text editor or displayed in the terminal (e.g., using `cat`).

task_completion.description: Configure the high-fidelity force model in GMAT.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the GMAT Force Model configuration window or script showing Gravity Field set to JGM-2 (Degree/Order 10x10), Point Masses including Sun and Luna, Drag set to JacchiaRoberts, and SRP (Solar Radiation Pressure) enabled.

task_completion.description: Set the propagation duration to 14 days and step size to 60 seconds.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the GMAT Propagate command or script showing the stopping condition set to 14 days (e.g., `ElapsedDays = 14`) and the step size set to 60 seconds in either the propagator or ephemeris settings.

task_completion.description: Configure the CCSDS OEM ephemeris output.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of an EphemerisFile configuration or script showing the file format as CCSDS-OEM, Interpolation Order set to 7, and the output path set to `~/GMAT_output/magsat2_predicts.oem`.

task_completion.description: Configure the SPICE SPK ephemeris output.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of an EphemerisFile configuration or script showing the file format as SPK (SPICE) and the output path set to `~/GMAT_output/magsat2_predicts.bsp`.

task_completion.description: Save the GMAT script to the specified location.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the GMAT script being saved to or existing at `~/Documents/missions/magsat2_ephemeris.script` (e.g., via a Save As dialog or terminal `ls` command).

integrity.description: Verify the agent used GMAT to generate the outputs.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent should interact with the GMAT GUI or write a structured GMAT script in a text editor. It must not just create dummy files with the expected extensions.

integrity.description: Verify the ephemeris files were generated by running the mission.
integrity.visual_evidence: The `.oem` and `.bsp` files should be generated by executing the GMAT script/mission (e.g., clicking 'Run' in GMAT or running it via CLI), not by manually typing fake content or using `touch`.

integrity.description: Verify the agent applied the parameters from the state file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent must be seen entering or copying the specific orbital and physical parameters from `magsat2_state.txt` into the GMAT spacecraft configuration.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires generating a GMAT script at '/home/ga/Documents/missions/magsat2_ephemeris.script' and outputting two ephemeris files (OEM and SPK) to '/home/ga/GMAT_output/magsat2_predicts.oem' and '/home/ga/GMAT_output/magsat2_predicts.bsp'. The target duration is exactly 14 days with a 60-second step size, and an OEM interpolation order of 7.
